data.title: Glassnode Highlights Key Support Levels Amid Bitcoin Sell-Off
data.description: According to Odaily, Glassnode has released an analysis indicating that Bitcoin long-term holders are gradually selling their assets due to a lack of strong upward catalysts and increased short-term pullback risks. If profit-taking continues, on-chain models suggest that critical support levels to watch are $103,700 and $95,600.

data.title: FIFA Crypto Video Game to be Released Next Week, Will Add Adidas Digital Assets
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Crypto game studio Mythical Games said on Friday that the company's FIFA game is about to launch, and Adidas-branded digital assets will be launched at that time. According to the statement, blockchain game company Mythical Games will launch the mobile game "FIFA Rivals" on June 12. The launch coincides with a licensing agreement with footwear and apparel giant Adidas. Mythical Games said in a statement: "Adidas brands and products will appear in 'FIFA Rivals', providing players with exclusive digital items, including jerseys, jerseys and shoes inspired by the brand's rich football heritage." (The Block)

data.title: Institution: The Federal Reserve is expected to resume interest rate cuts in July
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Jamie Cox, managing partner of Harris Financial Group, said that the U.S. labor market remains strong but is gradually cooling down. Given the significant revision of the previous value of this non-farm report, I expect the Federal Reserve to restart the interest rate cut mode in July. The current salary level is still stable, but it is likely to change in the coming months. The biggest variable in the job market is real estate - the property market has shown early risk signals, and the cooling of the labor market will exacerbate this trend. (Jinshi)

data.title: Tech Giants Explore Stablecoin Integration Amid Growing Interest
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, the cryptocurrency industry has long sought a 'killer app' to propel blockchain into mainstream finance, and stablecoins may be the answer. Stablecoins are digital tokens pegged to fiat currencies like the U.S. dollar, and banks and fintech companies are rapidly adopting this technology. Now, major tech companies are also showing interest.

Sources indicate that Apple, X (formerly Twitter), Airbnb, and Google are in early discussions with crypto companies to explore stablecoin integration. These companies believe that adopting stablecoins could reduce transaction costs and enhance cross-border payment processes.

In addition to Apple, X, Airbnb, and Google, Meta (formerly Facebook) is re-entering the payments technology space, focusing again on the potential of stablecoins despite previous setbacks due to regulatory pressures. Uber CEO Dara Khosrowshahi mentioned at a Bloomberg conference on Thursday that Uber is in the research phase, considering the use of stablecoins for global money transfers.

The interest from tech giants comes as stablecoins attract significant venture capital and legislative attention. The U.S. Congress is currently reviewing two bills aimed at regulating the stablecoin asset class. Meanwhile, payment giant Stripe recently acquired stablecoin startup Bridge, a move seen as a turning point for Silicon Valley's serious consideration of this technology.

data.title: Glassnode: BTC long-term holders are slowly selling off
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Glassnode published an analysis saying that due to the lack of strong upward catalysts and the rising risk of short-term pullbacks, BTC long-term holders are slowly selling. If profit-taking continues, the on-chain model that needs to be paid attention to shows that the key support levels are: $103,700 and $95,600.

data.title: The probability of the Fed not cutting interest rates or cutting once has risen to 34%.
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Wall Street traders scaled back their bets on rate cuts after Friday's stronger-than-expected May nonfarm payrolls report. According to CME data, interest rate futures show that the probability of three or more 0.25 percentage point rate cuts this year has dropped to 25% from 36% on Thursday. The probability of one or zero rate cuts has risen to 34% from 25%. (Jinshi)

data.title: UK Financial Conduct Authority: Lifting Ban on ETNs
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The UK Financial Conduct Authority (FCA) announced that it would lift the ban on cryptocurrency notes (ETNs) to support the UK's growth and competitiveness. (Jinshi)

data.title: Binance Alpha to List DeFi App (HOME)
data.description: Binance Alpha will list the DeFi App (HOME), with trading set to open on June 10. The exact time will be announced later. Eligible users will need to use Binance Alpha Points to claim the airdrop via the Alpha event page, which will be published on June 10th with the activity rules.

data.title: CosmFun officially opens new coin issuance function
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News CosmFun, the core project of CosmFinance ecosystem, announced the official opening of the new coin issuance function. The platform launched a "dual-track" audit system, integrating smart contract technology audit and decentralized community governance, and driving the liquidity engine through algorithms to build a full range of security barriers for each online project. 
It is reported that CosmFun, as a core project of CosmFinance ecosystem, has designed the "Memevault asset protection mechanism", which provides stability support for digital assets through smart contract custody, deflation model and liquidity optimization solutions. The platform adopts CSM pledge asset endorsement, automated deflation mechanism and long-term lock-up strategy of liquidity pool, and is committed to building a sustainable digital asset ecosystem.

data.title: Skatechain Foundation: Airdrop query tool is now online, exchange deposit channel has been opened
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Skatechain official foundation posted on the X platform that the SKATE token airdrop query tool is now online. Users can now also pre-deposit their token allocation to @bitgetglobal or @kucoincom and claim it directly on June 9. The pre-deposit window will end at 10 am (UTC) on June 7. In addition, the official reminder that this part of the allocation overview does not include @KaitoAI monthly Yapper rankings and recommended trading activities airdrops, @KaitoAI participants will be able to claim their allocation directly through Kaito Earn.

data.title: Moonbirds sales surge after Yuga Labs sells IP, with sales exceeding $2 million this week
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News After Yuga Labs sold the Moonbirds IP to the blockchain game development studio Orange Cap Games, market activity has become active again. According to data from NFT data aggregation platform CryptoSlam, Moonbirds' weekly sales have exceeded US$2 million, an increase of 2525% from the previous week. As of June 6, the series' monthly sales have exceeded its full-year sales in May. It has now become the seventh-highest NFT series in weekly sales, surpassing popular series such as Pudgy Penguins and Bored Ape Yacht Club (BAYC). (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Trump is considering selling his Tesla
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: A senior White House official said Trump is considering selling or giving away the red Tesla he bought earlier this year. Trump bought the car to promote Musk's business in the White House. As of Thursday evening, the car was still parked outside the West Wing of the White House. (Jinshi)

data.title: Traders cut bets on Fed rate cuts
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: U.S. short-term interest rate futures narrowed their earlier losses as traders reduced their bets on the Federal Reserve to cut interest rates after the release of employment data. (Jinshi)

data.title: Interest rate futures traders expect the Federal Reserve to cut rates twice this year, in September and December.
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Interest rate futures traders expect the Federal Reserve to cut interest rates twice this year, in September and December. (Jinshi)

data.title: James Wynn withdraws final $700,000 from Hyperliquid
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain analyst Yu Jin, James Wynn took out the last $700,000 of funds from Hyperliquid and then transferred 250,000 USDC to Kucoin. In fact, he transferred a total of 1.05 million USDC to Kucoin in the past few days.

data.title: The US Stablecoin GENIUS Act has triggered a fierce game between the two parties
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The GENIUS Act, a stablecoin bill that the U.S. Senate is about to vote on, has triggered a fierce game between the two parties. The legislative controversy disclosed on June 6 showed that the bill could reshape the $250 billion stablecoin market, but it was strongly opposed by people such as Republican Senator Josh Hawley of Missouri, who believed that it would give technology giants too much financial control. Hawley accused the bill of giving a green light to technology companies such as Meta to issue stablecoins in disguise. The amendment he submitted requires non-financial listed companies to be approved by the newly established "Stablecoin Certification Review Committee." Although some clauses were adopted, he criticized the final version for weakening key regulatory constraints. The Democratic Party is worried that the bill may provide regulatory arbitrage space for private companies such as Musk's X Money, and plans to propose an amendment to prohibit technology companies from issuing stablecoins. (New York Times)

data.title: Bitcoin technology company Matador completes final non-brokered private placement financing of approximately $1.4557 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Bitcoin technology company Matador Technologies Inc (TSXV: MATA) announced that it has completed the final round of financing of non-broker private placement, issuing 2,347,903 units at a price of 0.62 Canadian dollars per share and raising 1.4557 million Canadian dollars. So far, the company has issued a total of 7,419,354 units through three rounds of financing, with a total financing of 4.6 million Canadian dollars. The company stated that the funds raised will be used for the Bitcoin acquisition plan. The previous two rounds of financing were completed on May 30 and June 4, respectively. This private placement was initially announced on May 22. (GlobeNewswire)
